index.sub_hero: Near Zero-Knowledge Social Ecosystem. Encrypted. Sovereign. Yours.
index.pfd: Zero IP logging. Zero metadata collection. We keep the first 2 octets of your IP only for security validation against the ESID.
index.cszkpd: Using libsodium-wrappers, your data is encrypted on your machine before it ever transits our network.
index.drd: Your social feed is a sovereign stream. No central algorithm. No shadowbanning. Pure peer-to-peer logic.

about.title: SYSTEM_DOSSIER: ARCHITECTURE & ORIGINS
about.ldh: Legacy Data Harvesting vs. Citadel Sovereignty
about.history_p: Born from the collapse of the 21st-century surveillance state, MyCitadel was established as a sovereign digital sanctuary. It is the culmination of decades of counter-intelligence expertise, designed to return the power of data to the individual.
about.citizen_p: Privacy-conscious entities, whistleblowers, and sovereign individuals who refuse to be the product of an algorithm.
about.wyvern_bio: Brogan Cole Gallagher (TheWyv3rn). Formerly Aubrey W. Love II, Ph.D. C.S. An elite security architect holding CEH & OSCP certifications. He engineered the Citadel as the ultimate response to centralized data tyranny.
about.valhalla_p: The backbone of our offensive and defensive infrastructure. Valhalla provides the rigorous auditing and cold-storage logic that ensures the Citadel remains an unbreachable fortress.
about.ninja_p: A legendary figure from the eras of Anonymous and Lizard Squad. Operating the Cyber Security Division with total anonymity, IT_Ninja ensures our defensive layers are always ten steps ahead of state-level adversaries.
about.benefit1_p: Your attention is not for sale. We have deleted the advertising model entirely.
about.benefit2_p: We don't know who you are, where you go, or what you think. And we like it that way.
about.benefit3_p: In legacy social media, you are the product. In the Citadel, you are the Owner.

howto.title: CITADEL_OPERATIONS_MANUAL
howto.subtitle: SYSTEM_VERSION: 2.0.4 // PROTOCOL: ZERO_KNOWLEDGE
howto.reg_p1: Select a unique Alias. The Citadel recognizes no duplicates.
howto.reg_p2: Passwords require maximum entropy: 2x Lower, 2x Upper, 2x Symbols, 2x Numbers.
howto.reg_p3: ENCRYPTION_ALERT: Your hardware mathematically scrambles your credentials BEFORE transmission. We never see your plaintext.
howto.login_p: Credentials required: Alias + Email + Password. WARNING: Due to our zero-knowledge architecture, if you lose these, the Citadel cannot recover your access. Data is lost to the void.
howto.profile_p: Fully customizable. Avatars, Banners, and Markdown-enabled biographies. Every field completed yields +20 Reputation and unique identity badges.
howto.dash_p: Monitor your Reputation (Legacy) and Influence (Live). Track post velocity, connection density, and engagement metrics in real-time.
howto.comms_p: Peer-to-peer messaging. Communication is only possible between established connections. Premium Citizens gain Group-Array access.
howto.citizens_p: Browse all Citizens. Initiate connections to unlock profiles. Severing a connection triggers an immediate data-shredding protocol on all shared logs.
howto.feed_p: A stream of thoughts from your network. Alias masking is active on non-connection comments. To follow a commenter, utilize the Manual Search in the Citizens Directory.
howto.points_p: Build your standing through interactions. Badges offer static Rep, while reactions drive your dynamic Influence.
howto.coders_p: The Citadel is open-source. Pull the core from GitHub to contribute. Security researchers can engage via HackerOne, BugCrowd, or Intigriti. No financial rewards yet, just glory and security integrity.
howto.lang_p: Currently supporting 18 languages. UI persists across sessions. Note: User-generated content (posts/messages) remains in the sender's native tongue.
